title: Horror OneBlock
description: One block. Infinite terror. Survive the void while an evolving nightmare stalks your every move. Can you expand your island before the darkness consumes you?
body:
# **Horror OneBlock**

You wake up on a single block, suspended in a suffocating void. But you are not alone. Something is watching from the fog, waiting for you to expand your reach. In **Horror OneBlock**, every block broken is a gamble with your life.

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/def5cd631a784de837d952a309e462b84c94d7c6.png)

---

###  **Horror**
* **Stalking Entities:** Forget peaceful building. Horrifying creatures with advanced AI will track your progress, lurking in the shadows of your own island.
* **Evolving Horror:** As you progress through the phases, the threats become more intelligent, more aggressive, and more personal.
* **Sanity System:** Managing your resources is hard; managing your mind is harder. Stay near the light, or let the hallucinations take over.

###  **Progression**
* **OneBlock Mechanics:** Dig through custom phases designed to provide high-tier loot and low-tier nightmares.
* **Psychological Decay:** Dynamic soundscapes and visual distortions ensure that the silence of the void is never truly peaceful.
* **Hardcore Survival:** Thermal collapse and physical exhaustion mean that even the simplest task can be your last.

###  **Technical Features**
* **Atmospheric Immersion:** Pre-configured shaders and sound physics to maximize the dread.
* **Optimized Terror:** High performance even with complex entity AI, ensuring your death is smooth and lag-free.
* **Isolation Mode:** Best played alone, or in small groups where you can hear each other scream via proximity chat.

---

### **Reinstall World**
* In order to reinstall the world you must download it again or create a copy from zero.
  This pack uses [Oneblock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/oneblock/files/4494013) by **Crepi**, make sure to install the right version (1.19.2).

---

### **Survival Protocol**
1. Download and install the pack.
2. Allocate at least **6GB of RAM**.
3. Turn off the lights. Put on your headphones.
4. Start digging.

---
> **Developed by Froggy Studio**
